scopeProgress.name: API Client Foundation
scopeProgress.notes: App-Only bearer client; empty-token fail-loud + non-GET request-builder reject. NOTE (reconcile 2026-06-07): the 2026-05-27 'PKCE auth scaffolding' claim here was false — no PKCE/oauth2 code exists in internal/connector/twitter; User-Context PKCE is unimplemented and tracked by BUG-056-002 (GAP-056-G1).

scopeProgress.name: Pagination & Cursor Persistence
scopeProgress.notes: fetchEndpointPaginated + per-endpoint cursor persistence with maxPagesPerEndpoint=100 bound.

scopeProgress.name: Rate-Limit & Error Handling
scopeProgress.notes: 429 sleep-until-reset, 5xx exponential backoff bounded at maxRetries=3, 401/403 fast-fail; 3 prometheus metric vectors added.

scopeProgress.name: Hybrid Mode & Dispatcher Wiring
scopeProgress.notes: switch c.config.SyncMode dispatcher; hybrid idempotent archive + API polling; cross-origin dedup.

scopeProgress.name: Live-Gated Tests
scopeProgress.notes: api_live_test.go with SMACKEREL_TWITTER_LIVE_TESTS master switch + token gate + CI-forbid guard; docs/Connector_Development.md updated.

concerns.summary: Spec 056 was promoted to done 2026-05-27 partly on a false report.md claim that the User-Context OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow was delivered. The genuine gaps phase (2026-06-07) confirmed PKCE is unimplemented: a single static App-Only 'Authorization: Bearer' header is applied to every endpoint, including /2/users/me, /2/users/:id/bookmarks, /2/users/:id/liked_tweets, which spec.md NC-1 + design.md require user-context for. report.md line 7 was corrected to the honest App-Only-only statement. R-016 x-rate-limit-remaining gauge is also missing (MEDIUM). Both gaps are tracked by open BUG-056-002 (blocked, awaiting maintainer product decision BLK-056-002-pkce-product-decision).
concerns.resolution: PKCE User-Context OAuth 2.0 (S256) genuinely delivered via BUG-056-002 (internal/auth/oauth.go + internal/connector/twitter/oauth_*.go + migration 056_twitter_oauth_pkce.sql + per-endpoint auth-tier routing in api.go with fail-loud ErrUserContextTokenRequired). The 2026-05-27 report.md PKCE-delivered claim — false at the time — was corrected to truth on 2026-06-08 and is now accurate because the capability shipped; Gate G097 (delivered-claim conformance) now genuinely passes. The deferred harden phase ran 2026-06-09 (report.md -> ## Harden Pass — BUG-056-002 auth surface) with verdict ROBUST and is recorded in the phase records. Audit trail preserved: this entry is annotated resolved, not deleted.

concerns.summary: The harden specialist phase was never run for spec 056 and is intentionally NOT recorded (anti-fabrication G022/G041). Running harden on a connector missing a core spec-required auth flow (PKCE) would be premature. harden is deferred to BUG-056-002 delivery. As a direct consequence, artifact-lint legitimately still fails (exit 1) reporting harden missing; this residual is the honest, expected state and MUST NOT be cleared by fabricating a harden record.
concerns.resolution: Precondition satisfied: BUG-056-002 shipped the PKCE auth machinery, so the deferred harden phase was no longer premature. harden genuinely ran 2026-06-09 on the delivered auth surface (report.md -> ## Harden Pass — BUG-056-002 auth surface) with real executed grep + test evidence, verdict ROBUST across all six dimensions. The phase is now honestly recorded in execution.completedPhaseClaims + certification.certifiedCompletedPhases (backed by the evidence anchor, NOT a fabricated record). artifact-lint Gate G022 now legitimately passes.

concerns.summary: token-lifecycle: the user-context refresh read-modify-write (GetTokens -> exchange -> SaveTokens) is not serialized with a DB row lock (SELECT ... FOR UPDATE). For the single-operator 'default' owner this is acceptable — a concurrent double-refresh has both readers present the same prior refresh token, Twitter invalidates it on first use, and the second exchange then fails loud (ErrUserContextTokenRequired / refresh-failed) with no token corruption, no leak, no silent App-Only fallback. A row lock is worth adding only if multi-account concurrency lands.
concerns.evidenceAnchor: report.md -> ## Harden Pass — BUG-056-002 auth surface -> ### Low-severity observations -> OBS-1

concerns.summary: secret-handling / no-defaults: an empty oauth_client_secret is validated at token-exchange time (the confidential-client POST /2/oauth2/token is rejected by Twitter -> fail-loud) rather than at authorize-begin, where only client_id and redirect_url are pre-checked. Still fail-loud with no default/fallback secret (source is bare os.Getenv), just surfaced one stage later.
concerns.evidenceAnchor: report.md -> ## Harden Pass — BUG-056-002 auth surface -> ### Low-severity observations -> OBS-2

executionHistory.summary: Implemented all 5 scopes of the Twitter API v2 connector. Scope 01 added api.go + apiClient + empty-token fail-loud + non-GET reject. Scope 02 added pagination + per-endpoint cursors + replay test. Scope 03 added 429/5xx/401 handlers + 3 prometheus metric vectors + bearer-never-in-logs adversarial test. Scope 04 added hybrid dispatcher + cross-origin dedup + archive-mode-no-apiClient regression. Scope 05 added live-gated test scaffolding + docs/Connector_Development.md note.
Ran the full TestTwitterAPI_ suite under -race; 27+ sub-tests PASS.

Validated all 5 scope DoD items against real test PASS evidence. Every Gherkin scenario SCN-056-001..010 maps to a named TestTwitterAPI_* test with PASS or SKIP-by-design.

All PASS under -race.

executionHistory.summary: Delivery-validation + state-reconciliation pass for BUG-056-002 (User-Context OAuth 2.0 PKCE). Independently re-verified all 4 bug scopes GREEN (PKCE S256, AES-256-GCM encrypted store, authorize-begin/finalize/status CLI, per-endpoint auth-tier routing, fail-loud ErrUserContextTokenRequired with NO App-Only fallback, refresh-on-401 retry-once + 60s pre-expiry refresh, and the R-016 x-rate-limit-remaining gauge incl. the adversarial App-Only-on-user-owned->403 and non-429 gauge tests). Corrected this report.md Summary from the 2026-06-07 honest 'App-Only only / PKCE NOT implemented' statement to the now-truthful 'both App-Only + User-Context OAuth 2.0 PKCE delivered via BUG-056-002', and marked GAP-056-G1/G2 RESOLVED — the originally-premature claim is now TRUE because the capability genuinely shipped. No overclaim: the live real-Twitter 403->200 arm stays operator-gated/manual and is NOT claimed executed (fixture+unit+parity suite is what runs). Parent top-level status stays done; certification structure unchanged; spec.md/design.md/scopes.md untouched. Bug packet left at delivered-pending-audit (non-terminal); terminal certification deferred to bubbles.audit (separation of duties).

executionHistory.expansionEvidenceRef: report.md -> ## Harden Pass — BUG-056-002 auth surface (2026-06-08)
executionHistory.summary: Genuine harden phase — deferred 2026-06-07 because the connector lacked the PKCE auth machinery; now runnable since BUG-056-002 shipped it — executed on the User-Context OAuth 2.0 Authorization-Code-with-PKCE (S256) auth surface. Probed six security-sensitive dimensions with executed read-only grep + the sanctioned CLI test runner: secret-handling (no token/verifier/client_secret reaches any log/format sink; AES-256-GCM encrypted-store round-trip + empty-key fail-loud), pkce-integrity (32-byte CSPRNG verifier, S256-only, RFC 7636 Appendix B vector pinned by a passing test), csrf-state (32-byte CSPRNG state, 15-min TTL, DELETE...RETURNING single-use, unknown/expired fail-loud with zero token-endpoint hits), token-lifecycle (rotation persisted, refresh-once-on-401, App-Only-no-refresh tier gate, ErrUserContextTokenRequired with no App-Only fallback), input-redirect (config-only redirect_uri, 1 MB bounded token read), and sql (5 parameterized queries, zero concatenation). Verdict ROBUST on every dimension; all targeted auth/PKCE/tier/refresh/log-scan tests reported --- PASS (go test ./... finished OK). Three low non-blocking observations recorded: HARDEN-056-OBS-1 (refresh not row-locked), HARDEN-056-OBS-2 (client_secret validated at exchange not config-load), OBS-3 (the pre-existing report.md narrative-phrase artifact-hygiene note, owned by bubbles.validate, now cleared by the item-B narrative fix). No protected artifact modified by the probe; this phase-record write is bubbles.validate's state-reconciliation, anchored on report.md -> ## Harden Pass.

activeBugs.notes: DELIVERED via design Path A + validated 2026-06-08. User-Context OAuth 2.0 PKCE (spec.md NC-1 / design.md) now implemented for /2/users/me, /2/users/:id/bookmarks, /2/users/:id/liked_tweets (GAP-056-G1 RESOLVED), and the R-016 x-rate-limit-remaining gauge added (GAP-056-G2 RESOLVED). All 4 bug scopes A-D green; bubbles.validate independently re-verified (tests GREEN, check+lint clean). report.md Summary corrected 2026-06-08 from the interim honest 'App-Only only' statement to the now-truthful 'both tiers delivered'. The BLK-056-002-pkce-product-decision blocker is resolved (Path A chosen + shipped).
